title: Supply Chain Manager - AFL Logistics - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - AFL Logistics - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
